クラス EnergyState

java.lang.Object
model.entity.state.EnergyState
public class EnergyState extends Object
Holds runtime energy totals and burst-window accounting for a character.

    • getTotalScaledParticleEnergy

      public double getTotalScaledParticleEnergy()
      Returns total particle energy received after ER scaling (i.e. what was actually added to the energy bar from particles, excluding flat energy and burst reset).
      戻り値:
      ER-scaled particle energy total
